name: RappAgent — the RAPP ecosystem in one agent
summary: The one-drop universal ecosystem god agent: navigate, bootstrap (mint/scaffold/plant), operate the core (estate/neighborhoods/cubbies/eggs/super-RAR), record lineage, and INSTALL any specialist — 41 actions, airdroppable, offline-safe, drift-checked via action=verify.
tagline: Drop one file in your brainstem → the whole RAPP ecosystem, to spec, no drift.
author: Kody Wildfeuer
